payload.raw_text: As you all awaken, hearing this outside, what do you wish to do?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yeah, there's been a few days. You would've had time.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It sounds like there's very expensive things to drink and eat. I'm going to get my pocketbook.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Lots of pockets to pick!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Lots of bar brawls to start. Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Can I ask a retroactive question? Caleb, and maybe Beauregard, read all of Siff's journal?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Was anything more to be gleaned from reading the entire thing?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Just more understanding of the same notes you read before. From what remains of the tome, you managed to quickly grab the Cliff Notes of it as you glanced through it, and the more information you pulled from it filled out that your thoughts on those tidbits were correct.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, and then the only other question I have is I don't remember what time of day the party ended the day. If there was time I would've used paper and scrolls to transcribe into my book, if there was time.

payload.raw_text: All right, everybody. Yasha, you napped in the side alleyway in the open air, sleeping with one eye open, being careful. As you wake up in the cold morning mist, the mist has caused this dampness around your chin and hair--

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Fjord! There's a celebration going outside!

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: I can hear them. I think we're going to head downstairs if y'all want to join.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: All right, so you guys start heading downstairs. Who all is gathering down there with them?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right, everybody. Yasha, you napped in the side alleyway in the open air, sleeping with one eye open, being careful. As you wake up in the cold morning mist, the mist has caused this dampness around your chin and hair--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I heard a rumor last night that more are getting through. I don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I wonder how. I wonder if there's an underground passage that people aren't seeing or something. Or maybe they can go invisible. Or maybe they have an airship! Or maybe they can turn into mist, and fly through the air where people can't see them. I've heard of people doing that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All possibilities, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (knocking) Y'all up?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Fjord! Come in!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We're going out.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm naked! I'm not naked.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Fjord! There's a celebration going outside!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I can hear them. I think we're going to head downstairs if y'all want to join.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes! I run outside.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so you guys start heading downstairs. Who all is gathering down there with them?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Everybody!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: The guards are relaxed, but there's definitely a large presence, and in fact, a number of the games are run by the guards. In fact, Trebuchet, as you approach, you see two guards, male and female, that are both in the process of lifting a three or four year old girl, and she has a sandbag in her hand. They're like, "One, two, three!" and she throws it and it gets close, but stops before the basket, but they cheer her on, "Yay!" and set her down.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Trebuchet sounds pretty fucking sweet.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think we're immediately heading to Trebuchet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What do you mean? Is Trebuchet like a trebuchet?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: How the fuck do we know? We're going to find out, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Do you fire it? Do you sit in it? I don't know. There's only one way to find out.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to start walking towards the other one, the king's thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: All by yourself, Caleb?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going with Caleb. Want to come?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I want to get thrown in a trebuchet.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Go with them, then.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Does it seem like there are more guards around than usual? Are the guards relaxed?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You glance around, keeping an eye open as you guys continue. You've now hit the deeper edge of the Pentamarket. The crowds around you are fairly dense at this point. There are people laughing and talking. They're carrying various baked goods that are fresh out of the nearby carts or oven. The smell creeps into your senses and takes over from that point. Children run past and bump you in the side. Some are holding two ends of a streamer, and the streamers continue past and flap around, hitting people. It's adorable and delightfully intense. The guard presence is very much felt here, but everyone is in high spirits. You get the sense that everyone has been waiting to get to this festival, to this moment here. It's a much different atmosphere than the gala you had seen a week before in the Tri-Spires.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I know, but it's the principle.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well if you have 200 gold, you are more than welcome to place a gold piece up here as well."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We're okay. Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Very well."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I give her the stink-eye as we walk away.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Take care of your green friend there."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I intensify the stink-eye.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At this point, you guys turn around and you see the rest of your party has caught up to you. Fjord covered in dry dust.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I won a strawberry.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Fjord can't throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Did you have a different kind of dream?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: N-- No.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Beat again.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He won a silver, but I lost it.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: What game did you play?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It was called King's Crown.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: King's Vault.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's what I said.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, the one where they spin it around and you see which cup it is.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: She was very quick, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I wonder if there are any more games.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Very easy to find through a couple of sleight questions to some of the noncompetitive barkers. You manage to find a small meadery stand that's near the outskirts of one of the large arena structures, that you haven't seen used since you arrived in this city. As you approach, the older guy there, with this curled and unkempt chin-beard that looks like part of it isn't growing on the right side. You approach and he has all this thick, dark jugs of mead, and he is like, "Hey, you want some mead?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: They needed this catharsis, it feels like. TALIESIN Quite a party.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I want to find the most ridiculous mead out there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, there are quite a few mead stands, so it's easy enough for you. Make an investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Meat or mead?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Mead.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I want to find the candied apples.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Candy apple, all right, for you and the six for you. (shouting) All out of caramel apples for the time being, but return here in an hour!"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can see the older woman who's there, who a little bit portly with a big smile, rosy cheeks, pulls from behind the counter-- "They're still cooling off." You can see a small tray that has about six caramel covered apples that you see are still gleaming in the little bit of light that's coming from the cloudy sky.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes. That's what I wanted!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I haven't had one of those in such a long time.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to buy one for all of us.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "All right, that's going to be--"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We have to share one?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Two copper each. For seven, that'll put you at 14 copper."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. How much does that add up to in silver?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: One silver, four copper.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I pass it over.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "There's six caramel apples here, and you have seven with you."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's okay. No, it gets stuck in your teeth.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'll take the candy, because I've never had it.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: One of the people running the booth, quickly, as you see a mid-30s, half-elf man with a bit of chin scruff and very short hair, leans around the corner and goes, "Oh, for the Platinum Dragon. This one was handcrafted by me and my mate, over the period of about two months. Hand embroidered. Very difficult. Very exquisite. For the entire piece, the central piece you're inquiring about, that'll run you about ten gold pieces. We have smaller, almost doily-sized renditions of it back here."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm seeing if there's anything deeply gaudy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, actually. There is one that is an insignia or an interpretation of the symbol of the Platinum Dragon. It is silver threads among a standard sky-blue coloring. There's several different dragon heads that are woven into the pattern. There's almost an embroidery. For as much as you've known about the Platinum Dragon and the religion, it's surprisingly gaudy.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm trailing about 40 feet behind Molly.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's beautiful. How much is that, then?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Whoever wins this, gets to go up against our finest solder who should be back from his lunch break here in the next ten minutes or so. We have the new challenger Beau. Let's see." He points over to the grizzled-looking beastly man who's currently chugging down the final bits of a tankard of ale. Spins around, wipes it off his beard and stands up. "Yeah, I'm coming." He gets up onto the edge of the stage and goes, "Well, this is Kendall." (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yeah."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Buying people's loyalty for a gold a day?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Wow.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Sorry, I just-- all right. (sighs) Heard something about a Victory Pit. Is this the Victory Pit?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: She's the worst.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He goes, "No, you're not--" Points over and that large forum building, that circular forum building that you saw that now the crowd's starting to wash into that had been closed off previous weeks, he goes, "That, that is the Victory Pit. That will be happening in a few hours, but you're welcome to compete here if you're feeling so feisty."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "What's your name?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Beau.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Ah. Recruiter Leopold Wanstiker. Pleasure to meet you."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Person Beau. Nice to meet you. What is it? Leopold Sydney?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Recruiter Leopold Wanstiker. W-A-N-S-T-I-K-E-R.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wang stacker. All right. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: This is top knot dude?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Top knot guy, yep.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's the wang.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It talks about-- it pays one gold a day at start, with possibility of raises from there. The training is in Bladegarden and after a period of training there, it's three years minimum service in the military and then you can decide to stay or not. It goes into a small print and says like "desertion is illegal and brings imprisonment and fines."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (yelling) Lame!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Wow.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Hey Yasha, check it out, I got one too. It's a really shitty prize, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: What does it-- did you look at it yet?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I bet yours says, "Please don't ever contact us again."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, what dicks!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, it talks about--

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Can you read it for me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It says--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you read it-- (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No, I think this is for Marisha.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Do that, speak at the same time-- hear ye hear ye.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No. It speaks of the Righteous Brand and talks about all of the wonderful possibilities for glory. It's housing and gear provided, it's working in a good teamwork environment to protect the people of the Empire. It has opportunities to rise through the ranks and to become--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's propaganda.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "All right, pleasure to meet you. Well, I am the de facto leader of a mercenary band known as the Stubborn Stock. We're out of Guar on the Menagerie Coast, but we've been hired for about a seven month stint so far by the Empire and it's been paying pretty well. We've had some pretty good scenarios here. The retainer's been nice and honestly, it's not bad to be paid to sit around in case they need us."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I could tell.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "What's your purpose here? Are you looking for work?" ASHLEY Me or--?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yes, you."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I mean, it depends on what kind of work, I guess.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, mercenary work, of course."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh, well yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "All right, well, first off, my name is Darrow."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Hello Darrow.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "What's your name? Yasha, you said?"

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: My name is Yasha.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Well, it's contract. You have to be there for their disposal. We're stationed up in Nogvurot and have been for the length of this contract, but we were able to come down for this celebration and it's been not too bad. It's good wage, sit around, occasionally hunt down some criminal Xhorhasian terror that's come down from the mountains. It's a pretty decent living if I say so myself and you look like a very capable soldier if I say, again."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: My name is Yasha.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "All right, pleasure to meet you. Well, I am the de facto leader of a mercenary band known as the Stubborn Stock. We're out of Guar on the Menagerie Coast, but we've been hired for about a seven month stint so far by the Empire and it's been paying pretty well. We've had some pretty good scenarios here. The retainer's been nice and honestly, it's not bad to be paid to sit around in case they need us."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: What kind of work? It's just going out and killing things?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, when they need us. To kill things, to hunt things down. There's a lot of business that they can't bring the military to and the Crownsguard stay in the cities so they send us out and about. That's only if they need us."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: It's no contract? You can come and go as you please if you like?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "No, actually. We've only really been in the Empire for the first time this past half year and I've heard things about it and, you know, figured we'd come and try it. They gave us a week off to come down here to Zadash, and me and my friends are going to take our best attempt at this."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is that what you're being paid for up there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "One of many things."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wow.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: You said you've been fighting on the frontlines of Xhorhas, or--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, not yet. Not yet. Just the ones that come too close in. There've been a few excursions into the Empire itself and that's why we're hired. They're basically bringing everyone they can on hand to help keep the home fort defended."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: What are you fighting, if I may ask?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "What am I fighting? Right now?"

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Well, in Xhorhas. If you go out there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, we haven't been to Xhorhas yet."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: You haven't been to Xhorhas.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "They've kept us in the Empire so far."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: They've kept you in the Empire.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yeah. They keep the army on the eastern side, but we're meant to find things that the army cannot be bothered to do."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I understand.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You've fought in this Victory Pit before?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Yes. Just need to come on a day in which the archive is open and available, sign in, and you will be assigned one of our various attendees of the archive and you will have the run of the public library of which to read and make notes of. You may take your own copy of notes, but once, of course, it is only within the public space."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a deception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's all true, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) It is a 13.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: A 13? Okay. "Well, of course. It is open to the public. You're required to come when there is an available monk to escort you through the premises. Of course, you cannot take anything from the archive itself, but you're welcome to read while in the presence of one of our various monks and/or worshippers of the Knowing Mistress."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The entire library?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, the public portions of it, yes."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, of course.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Let me ask." He turns around and steps off of his pedestal and heads to this wooden door. It's about ten feet behind and he shoves through, closes behind him and slams. A few moments pass and people begin filtering through still, pushing past you and bumping you in the shoulders.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Should we go in, then? Yes?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I think we are.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is this where we go if we're going to fight?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I'm sorry? The fights will be soon."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How do we be one of the fights?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we'd like to enroll in the competition.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, you wish to enter?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, entry may have already been closed."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no, we're real good! You definitely want us to be in this. We put on a real good show!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "20 gold pieces per fighter. Groups of five to eight are allowed to enter. There are three rounds to this tournament."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, of course. We are the illustrious Mighty Nein. Servants of Zadash.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "The Mighty Nein. Where are you from, Mighty Nein?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: All parts.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: All over. Everywhere and nowhere.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: DM, could you say that crazy-ass name again?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yadaka Brigman. "You are from everywhere."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "You will be announced as from everywhere."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's good. We are from lots of places, after all.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, makes us feel very worldly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That's all right if that is what you require. All right! Well, we've warriors from around the Marrow Valley come to compete today, many of which who'll have been on the front lines of the eastern wastes. Are you still eager to lose your coin and risk your life?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I forget. Refresh my memory about what the fee is for entering this contest.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "20 gold pieces per fighter. Groups of five to eight are allowed to enter. There are three rounds to this tournament."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, of course. We are the illustrious Mighty Nein. Servants of Zadash.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "The Mighty Nein. Where are you from, Mighty Nein?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: All parts.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: All over. Everywhere and nowhere.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: DM, could you say that crazy-ass name again?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yadaka Brigman. "You are from everywhere."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "You will be announced as from everywhere."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's good. We are from lots of places, after all.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, makes us feel very worldly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That's all right if that is what you require. All right! Well, we've warriors from around the Marrow Valley come to compete today, many of which who'll have been on the front lines of the eastern wastes. Are you still eager to lose your coin and risk your life?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I forget. Refresh my memory about what the fee is for entering this contest.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Thank you. We've managed to squeeze you in at the last moment. The rules are as such. Each team will face off with one of these encounters we've developed for this tournament, continuing on if victorious to face another, until the other teams fall, you fall, or the third round is completed. Should there be more than one victory team at the end you will divide the purse amongst you. However, these will increase in difficulty the further you remain. You will not be allowed but the time it takes for the other teams to battle before you face once more. Previous years have shown us no more than maybe 20 minutes. Whatever you have in each round is what you go in with. Use your time wisely. All of this will be displayed in front of the Starosta, the appointees of the Crown, and the elite of the Tri-Spires. Money and glory is here before you."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We know there are. I mean, that's what we're looking for, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "There may very well be, young lass."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Then why are we doing this?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Good question."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Our friends, the Stubborn Stock, said that this was the thing to do for people of our mettle.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We're going to fight dangerous monsters.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Could you tell us who the other two groups are, besides ourselves and the Stubborn Stock?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, do you wish to join?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Of course, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Then present your coin. What is your name?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Fjord. Here, 20 gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Beauregard.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Caleb. Beauregard, can you front me 16 gold?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (sighs)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: There's four more for you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: His name is Caleb and Beauregard, I want that clear and on the record. It's Caleb and Beauregard.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, and Beauregard is the family name.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Kylre.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Fancypants. 20 gold. There you are.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Very well."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Mollymauk.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yasha.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Thank you. We've managed to squeeze you in at the last moment. The rules are as such. Each team will face off with one of these encounters we've developed for this tournament, continuing on if victorious to face another, until the other teams fall, you fall, or the third round is completed. Should there be more than one victory team at the end you will divide the purse amongst you. However, these will increase in difficulty the further you remain. You will not be allowed but the time it takes for the other teams to battle before you face once more. Previous years have shown us no more than maybe 20 minutes. Whatever you have in each round is what you go in with. Use your time wisely. All of this will be displayed in front of the Starosta, the appointees of the Crown, and the elite of the Tri-Spires. Money and glory is here before you."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We know there are. I mean, that's what we're looking for, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "There may very well be, young lass."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Then why are we doing this?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Good question."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Our friends, the Stubborn Stock, said that this was the thing to do for people of our mettle.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We're going to fight dangerous monsters.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Could you tell us who the other two groups are, besides ourselves and the Stubborn Stock?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, do you wish to join?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Of course, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Then present your coin. What is your name?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Fjord. Here, 20 gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Beauregard.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Caleb. Beauregard, can you front me 16 gold?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (sighs)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: There's four more for you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: His name is Caleb and Beauregard, I want that clear and on the record. It's Caleb and Beauregard.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, and Beauregard is the family name.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Kylre.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Fancypants. 20 gold. There you are.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Very well."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Mollymauk.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yasha.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "We have clerics on hand, and outside of extenuating circumstances, we've only had one true fatality in the past 20 years of running this festival, so you should be all right."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What happens if somebody in one of the other groups dies or something when fighting the creatures?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yadaka pipes in and goes, "Starosta, to announce anything like that would set panic and change nothing. We are far from the fight. For now, let them have a day to rejoice. We'll announce tomorrow." You miss the next thing, you miss the next thing. The last thing you hear is the Starosta say, "I'll send word to General Grinbreaker and begin preparing her legion to move east. Tomorrow we'll notify the public, but page, return word to Rexxentrum that Zadash prepares to join the front. Now, go." The page turns and leaves.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You saunter up at a relatively close distance. Make a perception check if you're trying to listen in.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Can I see through the box? Oh, it's a listening perception.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, the box is an illusion.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Four.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughter) Four.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Fuck.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You catch bits and pieces. Okay, what you hear is the page hurriedly saying, "--which skies now darken Brokenveil, over 1000 dead, the Ashguard Garrison is taken." You hear this conversation a bit hush to hush, and a little bit of (shushing). Starosta peeks in a bit. You only catch the next bit which goes, "What's the king's response?" Then you hear the page respond and say, "--formally declared war on Kryn Dynasty and the wastes of Xhorhas." There's some more muttering. You miss that. You miss that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughter) You miss that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Secret warp zone to level eight, miss that.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Well, you probably have to go to the King's Hall and sign up for the Crownsguard. Kiss ass for a few years and maybe then."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There are at the entrance where you came in and each side.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I make my way to one that's over by the entrance?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You back up towards where you guys came in, and there's a crownsguard there, arms crossed, looking up.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Man, I cannot wait to see this year's Victory Pit competition! I hear the beasts are heartier than they were last year.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I certainly hope so. It's going to be a lot of fun to watch."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Which one is your favorite so far?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, which one?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The beast they selected this year.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, I haven't seen them. They keep those under wraps. It's part of the surprise."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Really?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yeah!"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Man, I heard you guys were more informed than that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughter) "Not us, that's above our pay grade."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Really? Sheesh. What do you got to do to get duty like that?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: The door to this side suddenly swings open, and a beast begins to lumber out, chains detaching from manacles on two of its tethered, large tentacle-like arms. This grayish-brown mass, probably close to 15 feet in height, with a giant mouth filled with teeth and a large tongue that lolls off the side. Three tendrils reach off of it as these large, heavy feet pull it forward. Smell wafts around it of feces and rot. I need all of you to roll initiative, as this creature emerges right there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Would I have been able to cast a spell as we are pushed forward into all this mess?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You would.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Blur.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Blur, all right. You have a Blur spell on right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Put me behind that wall, yep.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Where's the opening?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, where did the monster come out of?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys entered from this side over here, and you saw the monster enter from this space.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Matt, I take that back. I'm not going to cast Blur. Sorry, my apologies.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can you help me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What do you want to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I want to be there.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Can I do that on the other one, opposite her?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'll back up into mine.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: As close to the center as is possible.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I will be behind the pillar over there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Over here?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No, this one over-- yes, thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That, I think, is the door where it opens.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It could be anywhere, to be fair.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, right. There's multiple doors.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The emcee disappears and vanishes into the back. You guys all take a quiet moment, looking around you in silence. As the audience gets quiet, still, you can see hundreds and hundreds of faces all staring, strangely formless when it's a cloud like this in all directions, little beams of light peeking through the clouds, hitting the sand and dirt on the ground before you. In that quiet, you hear (slamming). You glance around briefly and see not one, but two doors seem to have opened.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Only one of them has a creature that emerges. It seems like they're playing mind games with you so you don't know where it's coming--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Or the other one's invisible.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: That ends your turn, Molly. It is now the creature's turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Total ten? That misses. The third blow goes wide, no impact. That ends your turn. Molly, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to use Vicious Mockery and just, you know: (demonic voice) You've got no arms, it's awful! It's a psychic attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I start laughing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's a--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It says wisdom, but is it charisma?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's a wisdom save, but it's charisma-based. The DC's ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Okay, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's a natural 20 on its saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That saves.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's okay. I'm going to also use my bonus action to light my other sword.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so you have both blades now going?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I have both blades going now, so I'm knocking that down.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Which rite?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: With not the ice, the--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The Rite of the Dawn? Okay, got it. Both of your blades are now glowing.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to run, let's see, I've got 30 feet? I'm going to cross and run for cover behind that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: He said about 20 minutes between rounds, and a short rest is an hour.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Back behind a wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh god. Does it look like it's hurting at all?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It looks like it's hurt.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: While I'm in its grasp, can I touch the tentacle and cast Toll the Dead again?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If you'd like to.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: If you think that would help.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I want to do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. The saving throw-- that's cocked. No, that is a five plus one.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Two.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Hey, it all helps. It all goes to the same place. You are still restrained and held in place there. Anything else you want to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I probably should have tried to un-restrain myself.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You're a great player.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, it's an action to break free.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's an action. Well, I already did it. I already Tolled the Dead, so too late.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: End of your turn?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I guess so.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yasha, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to attack again.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There's no short rest between here and--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: There could be.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, there could be more groups, man.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You have not used reckless. That gives you advantage on your attacks.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: If you think that would help.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I want to do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. The saving throw-- that's cocked. No, that is a five plus one.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Two.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Hey, it all helps. It all goes to the same place. You are still restrained and held in place there. Anything else you want to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I probably should have tried to un-restrain myself.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You're a great player.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, it's an action to break free.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's an action. Well, I already did it. I already Tolled the Dead, so too late.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: End of your turn?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I guess so.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yasha, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to attack again.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There's no short rest between here and--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: There could be.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, there could be more groups, man.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He said about 20 minutes between rounds, and a short rest is an hour.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Do I have advantage on attack, or no?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: If you go reckless, you can.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yes, that's right, I haven't used reckless yet. Shit.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Next to Nott. All righty, I need you all to roll initiative. (screaming)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That was intense. Would we be able to have fought those two minotaurs?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No! Of course not!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "The first fallen in the tournament!"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Focus on one target at a time.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Let us greet back to the field, The Mighty Nein!" The doors open once more.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: She's Cure Woundsing me!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. Where do you guys wish to be placed?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is it possible to climb up on one of the walls?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If you'd like to try.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to try and climb up on top of the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an athletics check real fast.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Am I able to take a potion of healing?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's really good. This one, sure. Why not.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This one here?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'll back up into that far corner.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This one here?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's a 22.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you're fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'll move here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nott?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Dead center. I'm going to cast Mage Hand.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Yasha?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to stand by Caleb, actually.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You're with Caleb there?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Beau, ten points.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yes! I love you, Jester!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. As you guys all take your place, two gates immediately open again. You hear two sources of this loud, deep (howling). Leaping through both sides, you see two massive, white furred wolves come leaping through into a full sprint.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I Invoke Duplicity in the middle of the-- next to Nott.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: From this side and this side here. You Invoke Duplicity?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, next to Nott.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You got it. That ends Molly's turn. It is now the wolves' turn. This one is going to run, pacing around this side, up into that range there. It's going to rush up and partially pass through the Jester illusion, look back and see all that crowd in front, in its area. It pulls back and its shoulders curl up and the fur expands and (deep roar). You watch as a burst of freezing winter air blows out of its open mouth.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Five points of damage to him!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Five points of damage, nice. All righty.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Or her.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As the divine flame burns up around it, it's still running.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to make my Invoked Duplicity Jester run right in the middle of the two walls, past Fjord.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right there?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, and she's going to start going (gibberish).

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Look at me, look at me!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, that ends your turn. Molly, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to take a run towards the fake Jester.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. 25. 30

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it's where I can get there. I'm going to try and see if I can make Vicious Mockery work on this thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You have line of sight.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I do have line of sight?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's a eight, so that hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: (sinister voice) Bad doggy! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Butt turkey?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yep, butt turkey, you heard me. That's one point of psychic damage and it has disadvantage next attack.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Six to that guy. As both bolts hit the open wound that Yasha left behind, it's now starting to growl and look like it's in pain and is getting cornered-animal angry.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, that's how it is.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: It's three, I'm sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Roll again, that's fine. It's 2d6 reroll. It's okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay. (counting) Seven, ten, 27.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 27 points of damage! You carve a hefty chunk out of this wolf as you slam down with your blade. As it carves past, you see where the white fur has now become red on its left side. It (whimpers) pulls back from the pain. Part of its flesh is flapping from the wound you left as you draw the blade back. That was a pretty hefty hit. That ends Yasha's turn. Nott, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I'm going to aim for that flap of skin.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Fjord, you're up next.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Fire. 25 to hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That definitely hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That is 16 points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 16 points of damage. Beautiful!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I will run. Nope, I will fire again. (reloading) Same place.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 16 to hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That hits! Roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Six points.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: That ends your turn, Molly. It's now the wolf's turn. Let's see if they get their breath back. Nope and nope, neither of them do!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Only one way to find out.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's a yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no! Well, I'm going to move around him. I'm going to move to his tail. To the pillar, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, you're right up against the pillar, we'll say. That ends your turn, Jester. Molly, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to take a slashing attack at the guy right in front of me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's-- oh, goddamn it-- that's 12 to hit?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 12 does not hit, unfortunately. It ducks out of the way.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to hit it again. Oh my god, it's a natural fucking one. (mix of cheers and groans)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're trying to swing at it, but unfortunately, for some reason, the howl of its presence and it moving so quickly in front of you throws you off and your blades are not going well.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to try and circle around a little bit to space everybody out a bit.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: That is going to be-- and it has advantage, since you used your reckless. That's going to be--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's-- oh, goddamn it-- that's 12 to hit?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 12 does not hit, unfortunately. It ducks out of the way.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to hit it again. Oh my god, it's a natural fucking one. (mix of cheers and groans)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're trying to swing at it, but unfortunately, for some reason, the howl of its presence and it moving so quickly in front of you throws you off and your blades are not going well.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to try and circle around a little bit to space everybody out a bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That ends your turn, Molly. It's now the wolf's turn. Let's see if they get their breath back. Nope and nope, neither of them do!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Huge!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They are both going to make a single bite attack. One of them is going to be, let's see, against you, Yasha. You did the most amount of damage to it, so it's going to make a bite attack against you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Right as they get up to them, they pass out. They pull them off, and drag them, the gates open wipe, the clerics rush out and grab and drag in the bodies. The gnome is gone but one of the clerics reaches over and touches him, and for a moment later (gasps) breath comes back and you watch the wound close up somewhat. Brought from death. As they pull the group in--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: They pass out when the manacles go on?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: One of them swings and strikes, but as he strikes it passes through and it all of a sudden shifts, and was not in the space where it blow and it pounces onto one of his adventurers. They begin to hack back and forth, crowding up around each other back to back, one of them is pulling out his longbow and letting loose arrow after arrow. Some striking, some missing. One of them all of a sudden the phase is lost, it gets struck, and now it is in a solid place. They use that moment for all of them to dash in and surround this one creature. They manage to, within one round, carve down this one displacer beast on one side, the other pouncing onto Darrow and holding him to the ground. Its back legs clawing into his belly as the others try and pull it off. Darrow takes a serious series of wounds before he manages to pull himself free. The displacer beast grabs another of its friends and snaps him in his face. He falls unconscious and whips around. They strike at it a few times, but they can't seem to find where its body is. It is dodging around until finally Darrow is back up, his face covered in blood, takes his battle axe and swings wide and clocks it in the side of the jaw. Its strange illusion form vanishes at that point, its body coming to a very condensed location. They all swarm this one, and one by one tear it down for the next round. They're hurt, their bruised, and Darrow's looking rough, but with that the Stubborn Stock raise their hands "The Stubborn Stock, continues!" and the crowd cheers.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I need to learn that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The shout comes for the next group. "The Stubborn Stock returns!" and Darrow and his team rush out, giving a pat on the shoulder to Yasha on the rush out. They go out to the middle field, the gates close, and there, two of the gates open on the sides and you see these dark shapes kind of-- (materialization noise)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, no.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Almost skittering but shifting, their position seems hard to map. At which point you see Darrow glance on the side and he goes, "Oh no, I know what this is!" You watch as these large panther-like creatures with large tendrils off their back whipping begin rushing inward.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (shouting) Displacer Beasts!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As they pull back in, the MC walks back out. "Two rounds completed, and only two teams remain for the third and final round, will they all fall? Will they all survive? We shall see as next, we call forth The Mighty Nein!" Any preparation you guys have in this moment as the doors begin to open?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I was hoping they would lose.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: For one minute, so your Invoke Duplicity's gone.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Defend themselves, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You don't want to be near me. You should be in the middle, able to move.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What are you doing, Yasha?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm over there flanking with Beau.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to go, with me and you Molly on the other door.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This is such a bad idea.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This is going to be like two rounds to get to whoever--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: How long does Invoke Duplicity last?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You're going to be alone for two full rounds with whatever this thing is.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm fast as fuck.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, what if you're there-- what if it comes out of that door?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: All right, this is how much time we have to plan in the moment as this is happening.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This is a terrible plan.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Guys--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait what are all the doors by-the-by?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, there are four doors right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: There are four doors?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, there's one two--

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It has these tiny little spines stuck into it, like it's been agitated and pushed to a point of absolute rage and anger. It's just roaring.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nott, you're staying there?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm ready to shoot anything that comes out of this door.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You're going to be at disadvantage because it's going to be right next to you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You're too close.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No, I'm not. I have a crossbow feat.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: They won't see him maybe they won't--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As the quiet has this stillness that's come across the whole battlefield, every breath is being held. You all in your chaos, running around and trying to shout orders to each other, you all eventually come to settle in this place. (slow, heavy footfalls, roaring) All the doors come upward. Heavy, repeated footfalls hit, before bursting out of the far end, you see a Hill Giant come barreling through. (yelling)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Knocking that pillar down, as it stands there in the center of the field, you see now its--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (shouting) My door, my door!
